/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_netty_config_nettycore.dir/__/__/tests/lemo/config/test_netty_config.cc.o -o /home/wangmaosen/copy_linux/third/KVStore/bin/LemoNettyCore/config/test_netty_config  libnettycore_config.a libnettycore_log.a libnettycore_server.a libnettycore_socket.a libnettycore_io.a libnettycore_fiber.a libnettycore_memory.a libnettycore_thread.a libnettycore_utils.a -lyaml-cpp
